channel.title: Bugården on Booster Conference 2026 Bergen
channel.description: Recent content in Bugården on Booster Conference 2026 Bergen

item.title: SQL Mystery - Murder at Bryggen
item.description: Want to freshen up your SQL skills? How long has it been since you wrote some direct and complex queries, and not only joins or simple selections? Time to change that. Inspired by the OG SQL Murder Mystery (by Northwestern University Knight Lab), we have created a scenario in Bergen, and it is your job to solve the murder. Your tools? SQL queries. Let’s see if your detective skills are sufficient to find out who did the murder! Maybe there are twists to the tale that you need to solve?
